tldr:
• CryptoTether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit, allowing traders to hedge risk and speculate on gold prices.
  • TokenisationThe race to tokenise markets is live, with various companies and institutions exploring the potential of tokenisation.
  • BitcoinBitcoin miner IREN enters Europe with Nostrum acquisition, expanding its operations and building its European AI cloud platform.
montis:
• CryptoTether Gold options market is now available on Bybit, allowing traders to hedge risk and speculate on gold prices. This move is expected to increase liquidity and trading activity in the gold market. 💡 Montis angle: The introduction of Tether Gold options on Bybit may lead to increased adoption of cryptocurrency-based gold trading.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • TokenisationTokenisation of markets is a growing trend, with companies like Pontes and SIX exploring the potential of tokenisation. Tokenisation can increase efficiency and reduce costs in the trading process. 💡 Montis angle: Tokenisation may disrupt traditional trading models and create new opportunities for investors.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • BitcoinBitcoin miner IREN has acquired Nostrum, expanding its operations in Europe. IREN is building its European AI cloud platform, which is expected to increase its competitiveness in the market. 💡 Montis angle: The acquisition of Nostrum by IREN may lead to increased investment in Bitcoin mining and AI technology.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • CryptoCrypto news is constantly evolving, with new developments and trends emerging every day. Staying up-to-date with the latest news is essential for investors and traders. 💡 Montis angle: The crypto market is highly volatile, and investors must be aware of the latest trends and developments to make informed decisions.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • DLTDLT settlement is becoming increasingly popular, with companies like The Block and Blockworks exploring its potential. DLT settlement can increase efficiency and reduce costs in the trading process. 💡 Montis angle: DLT settlement may disrupt traditional settlement models and create new opportunities for investors.
    ↗ Source June 16

are exploring the potential of tokenisation and DLT settlement
